title: selaginella estrellensis
intro: Selaginella estrellensis, also known as Starry Spikemoss, is a type of small, terrestrial, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Selaginella estrellensis include the potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
